visualizerParams.title: Counting Summations
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Refactor the partition count to use the pentagonal number theorem for significantly better performance on large numbers.

solution.explanation: The Pentagonal Number Theorem provides a much faster recurrence for the partition function, reducing the complexity from O(n^2) to O(n * sqrt(n)). While not strictly necessary for n=100, it's the standard way to calculate large partition values.
